name: tinect/oauth2-storefront-login
description: Adds OAuth2/OIDC login support to the Shopware 6 storefront (Microsoft, Google, GitHub, generic OIDC)

description.de-DE: OAuth2/OIDC-Login für Shopware 6 via GitHub, Microsoft Entra ID, Google oder beliebige OIDC-Provider. Unterstützt Kontenverknüpfung, E-Mail-Verifizierung und E-Mail-Aktualisierung.
description.en-GB: OAuth2/OIDC login for Shopware 6 storefront via GitHub, Microsoft Entra ID, Google, or any OIDC provider. Supports account linking, email verification, and email updates on login.

check: docker run --rm -v $(pwd):/ext shopware/shopware-cli:latest extension validate --check-against lowest --full /ext
docker run --rm -v $(pwd):/ext shopware/shopware-cli:latest extension validate --check-against highest --full /ext
